## Checklist

- [ ] If wire protocol changed: both sides updated in this PR
- [ ] If HA integration changed: `manifest.json` `version` bumped
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] No new TODO/FIXME comments left for someone else to do
- [ ] No new hardcoded paths, tokens, team IDs, or other PII
